tables.label: t_master
header_rows: Subgroup c c ‘E’, ‘S’, ‘X’ indicate EB, SB2 and HMXB, respectively; ‘B’, ‘W’, ‘D’ indicate Bar, Wing, and boundary stars, respectively; ‘m’ indicates object in multi-epoch spectroscopic sample.
\vtot d d Final residual velocity relative to SMC and Wing systemic motion. The \vloctot values are computed relative to local velocity fields (see text). RV errors are typically 10 \rm km s^-1 .
\vloctot d d Final residual velocity relative to SMC and Wing systemic motion. The \vloctot values are computed relative to local velocity fields (see text). RV errors are typically 10 \rm km s^-1 .
Quality e e ‘a’ indicates object meets \sim 10 % asymmetry criterion in RA vs Dec; the second and third values give the number of stars within 1 \arcsec and 1.5 \arcsec , respectively.
RV d d Final residual velocity relative to SMC and Wing systemic motion. The \vloctot values are computed relative to local velocity fields (see text). RV errors are typically 10 \rm km s^-1 .
v_\rm RA f f Transverse velocity computed from proper motion, without geometric or systemic velocity corrections.
err g g Measurement errors, not including systematic errors (see text).
v_\rm Dec f f Transverse velocity computed from proper motion, without geometric or systemic velocity corrections.
err g g Measurement errors, not including systematic errors (see text).
v_\rm loc,\rm RA f f Transverse velocity computed from proper motion, without geometric or systemic velocity corrections.
err g g Measurement errors, not including systematic errors (see text).
v_\rm loc,\rm Dec f f Transverse velocity computed from proper motion, without geometric or systemic velocity corrections.
err g g Measurement errors, not including systematic errors (see text).
